name: skill-kit
description: Author, evaluate, security-review, and autonomously improve Claude Agent Skills. Bundles the skill-building workflow as the improving-skills autoresearch loop, goal-setting commands, reference protocols, and the static eval harness.

interface.shortDescription: Author, evaluate, and improve agent skills.
interface.longDescription: Skill Kit packages the improving-skills workflow and static harness so Codex can help author, evaluate, security-review, and iterate on Agent Skills with evidence.
defaultPrompt: Review this skill with Skill Kit.
